comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Root cause: /home/ribelo/projects/ribelo/apsis has its own .pi/loops but no nearer .git/settings marker, so findNearestWorkspaceRoot climbed to /home/ribelo and the Ralph ownership cache looked in /home/ribelo/.pi/loops instead of apsis/.pi/loops. Also the agent tool description is process-global, so it must refresh for the current session before prompt construction. Fix: .pi/loops is now a workspace-root marker, /agents refreshes availability after preloading Ralph policy, and before_agent_start refreshes the agent tool description for the current session. Regression tests: agents-settings child .pi/loops over parent .git; agents-menu before_agent_start description only shows finder. Verified against the real apsis-ayf state: enabled agents resolve to [finder]. Gate passes; review approved.
